title: Vegan Gooey Gouda Casserole
description: A rich and creamy casserole made with vegan gouda cheese, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large saucepan, sauté the garlicky until fragrant.
Add the cubed bread to the saucepan and toast until lightly browned.
In a separate saucepan, melt the vegan gouda cheese over low heat.
Add the chopped dill to the melted cheese and stir to combine.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, layer the toasted bread mixture and the cheesy dill mixture.
Top with additional gooey and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
